description: Automation for creating UnPlanned work items (capacity for unexpected tasks) with team member task assignments

issueTemplate.descriptionTemplate:
Capacity for unexpected work, change requests, and contingency planning.

This issue tracks unplanned work items that arise during the sprint that were not part of the original commitment.

Team has allocated buffer capacity for:
- Urgent bug fixes
- Change requests from stakeholders
- Technical debt mitigation
- Operational support tasks

taskTemplate.descriptionTemplate:
Contingency capacity allocated to {memberName} for unplanned work during {sprintName}.

This task represents buffer time allocated for unexpected tasks or change requests that may arise.

scrum-standard.description: Standard buffer allocation for unplanned work
